title: Rhenus Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rhenus Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
